PropertyValue:
(
    SELECT TOP (1)
        ref.shipment_id
    FROM AIT_SS_BOL_ref_charges_mst ref
    INNER JOIN AIT_SS_BOL_mst b
        ON b.shipment_id = ref.shipment_id
    WHERE ref.ref_num = CoNum
      AND b.ship_date >= DATEADD(SECOND, -5, ShipDate)
      AND b.ship_date <= DATEADD(SECOND,  5, ShipDate)
    ORDER BY ABS(DATEDIFF(SECOND, b.ship_date, ShipDate))
)
ISNULL( CoiItem, CoihItem )
ISNULL(CoiCustPo, CoCustPo)
(Select Name from custaddr_mst where cust_num = CustNum and cust_seq=0)
GetDate()
(Select State from custaddr_mst where cust_num = CustNum and cust_seq=0)
CASE WHEN DoNum IS NOT NULL THEN DoCarrier ELSE CarrierName END
CASE WHEN DoNum IS NOT NULL THEN DoCarrierNum ELSE ShpCarrierCode END
ISNULL(CoiCustNum, CoCustNum)
CASE WHEN CoiCustNum IS NULL THEN CoCustSeq ELSE CoiCustSeq END
CASE WHEN DoNum IS NOT NULL THEN DoContainer ELSE ShpContainer END
CONCAT(CoNum,  '-', CoLine)

case CoihStat
when 'H' then
CohShipmentApprovalRequired
else
CoShipmentApprovalRequired
end

ISNULL(dbo.UomConvQty(
           (Select SUM(IsNull( csal.qty_approved, 0) ) from co_ship_approval_log as csal where csal.co_num = CoNum and csal.co_line = CoLine and csal.co_release = CoRelease and csal.date_seq = DateSeq and csal.ship_date = ShipDate),
           ISNULL(dbo.Getumcf(CoiUM, CoiItem, CoCustNum, 'C'), 1),
          'From Base')
        , 0)
ISNULL(CoCurrCode, HcoCurrCode)
coi.price*(100-Coalesce(NULLIF(coi.disc, 0),co.disc))/100
(SELECT coalesce(Family_Code,'') FROM dbo.item WHERE Item = CoiOrCoihItem)

ROUND(ISNULL(dbo.UomConvAmt(
           Price,
           ISNULL(dbo.Getumcf(CoihUM, CoihItem, HcoCustNum, 'C'), 1),
          'From Base')
        , 0), HCurrPlaces)

ISNULL(dbo.UomConvQty(
           QtyReturned,
           ISNULL(dbo.Getumcf(CoihUM, CoihItem, HcoCustNum, 'C'), 1),
          'From Base')
        , 0)

ISNULL(dbo.UomConvQty(
           QtyShipped,
           ISNULL(dbo.Getumcf(CoihUM, CoihItem, HcoCustNum, 'C'), 1),
          'From Base')
        , 0)
ROUND(QtyShipped * Price, HCurrPlaces)
DerQtyShippedConv - DerCumulativeApprovalQty
DerQtyInvoicedConv - DerCumulativeApprovalQty - DerQtyReturnedConv
QtyShipped * DerDiscPrice

CAST(PackNum AS NVARCHAR(30)) + '-' + CAST(CoNum AS NVARCHAR(30)) + '-' + CAST(CoLine  AS NVARCHAR(30)) + CASE WHEN CoRelease <> 0 THEN  '-' ELSE ' ' END + CASE WHEN CoRelease <> 0 THEN CAST(CoRelease AS NVARCHAR(30)) ELSE ' ' END
CASE WHEN DoNum IS NOT NULL THEN DoPickupDate ELSE ShpPickupDate END
